meaning: n.埃特(女子名,Henrietta 的昵称)
examples: Why was Daddy yelling at Etta this morning?
At that moment, the lead singer looked at me and said "This is for the woman with the beautiful green eyes" and began playing the song "At Last" by Etta James.
Etta was supposed to go grocery shopping when the storm hit. So you were stuck reading old Reader's Digests for three days, living on sardines and ramen noodles.
It's often said of Etta James that you could hear her whole life in her voice.
Etta James went to extremes and owned them in her life and in her music.
